Welcome to Oberoi Hotels & Resorts Welcome to Oberoi Hotels & Resorts Experience our personalised service in six countries all around India, Egypt, Indonesia, Mauritius and Morocco. At each destination, we offer a taste of local cuisines, inspired architecture and accommodation with magnificent views of the surrounding landscapes. All complemented by the sincere, intuitive attention to your every need that is unmistakably Oberoi. Heart. Felt. Oberoi Hotels & Resorts has been ranked the Best Hotel Group in the World by the Telegraph Travel Awards UK, 2025. A Night With Our Compliments A Night with our Compliments Reserve a stay for two nights or more and enjoy a complimentary third night. Valid on reservations made between 9th and 26th June, 2026 for stays until 31st July, 2026. Valid on reservations made between 9th and 26th June, 2026 for stays until 31st July, 2026. Know More > Destinations India India Egypt Indonesia Mauritius Morocco Saudi Arabia The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. Inspired by Mughal palace designs with fountains, terraced lawns, reflection pools and pavilions, the resort offers unrestricted views of the Taj Mahal. Explore The Oberoi Vindhyavilas Wildlife Resort, Bandhavgarh. An oasis of luxury in the heart of India, nestled in Madhya Pradesh and surrounded by the serene beauty of the wilderness. Explore The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Nestled in lush, tropical grounds and equipped with the latest technology, this urban retreat reflects and harmonises the dual personality of Bengaluru, the Garden City and India’s IT hub. Explore The Oberoi, Gurgaon. A striking example of contemporary design and minutes from New Delhi international and domestic airport terminals, this urban sanctuary offers a sense of calm and seamless connectivity. Explore The Oberoi Rajvilas, Jaipur. A royal resort amidst the timeless charm of the Pink City, recreating the magnificence of princely Rajasthan in a beautiful fort setting with lush gardens and reflection pools. Explore Naila Fort, An Oberoi Luxury Residence, Jaipur (Now Open). An intimate royal retreat rooted in Rajasthan’s heritage. Set high in the Aravalli Ranges, the fort offers sweeping views across forested hills and the plains of Jaipur. A four-bedroom luxury residence, offered exclusively for private stays. Explore The Oberoi Rajgarh Palace, Khajuraho. Perched atop the Maniyargh Hills near Khajuraho in Madhya Pradesh, this 350-year-old palace was built by Raja Hindupat Singh Bundela of the Bundela Dynasty. Its grand vaulted interiors are adorned with intricate frescoes and hand-painted motifs that reflect the artistry and regal heritage of Bundelkhand. Explore The Oberoi Grand, Kolkata (under restoration). An icon on the landscape of Kolkata, with a reputation for taking care of its guests, the heritage landmark stands proudly in the heart of the 'City of Joy'. Explore The Oberoi, Mumbai. A seaside sanctuary in the 'City of Dreams'. Located on Marine Drive in fashionable South Mumbai, the hotel enjoys a superlative position close to key business hubs, cultural landmarks and upscale shopping destinations. Explore The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. A tranquil sanctuary in the Himalayan foothills. Surrounded by protected natural forest, the serene retreat offers personalised Ayurvedic and wellness programmes designed for rejuvenation, balance and inner calm. Explore The Oberoi, New Delhi. An iconic luxury hotel overlooking Delhi Golf Course and Humayun’s Tomb. With world-class dining, round-the-clock service and clean air technology, it reflects Oberoi’s legacy of refined luxury and warm hospitality. Explore The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore. Situated next to Ranthambhore National Park and Tiger Reserve, the resort is perfectly located for sighting Royal Bengal Tigers in their natural habitat. Explore The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla. A Heritage Grand Hotel with rich wooden floors, glowing fireplaces, a grand atrium lobby and panoramic mountain views - echoing the elegance and charm of a bygone era. Explore Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla. Set within 93,077 square metres (23 acres) of fragrant cedar forest and perched 2,515 metres above sea level, the resort offers a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in nature. Wildflower Hall provides a unique opportunity for you to lose yourself in the romance of nature. Explore The Oberoi Udaivilas, Udaipur. Set on the serene banks of Lake Pichola, this palace-inspired retreat captures the romance and grandeur of Udaipur, the ‘City of Lakes.’ With domed pavilions, lush gardens and intricate architecture, every detail reflects the rich heritage of Rajasthan. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh. Discover underwater treasures and beachside luxury that is unmistakably Oberoi, at our all suite resort nestled along the shores of the Red Sea. Explore The Oberoi Philae, Luxury Nile Cruiser. Cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser and fall in love with the secrets of ancient Egypt; from awe inspiring pyramids to timeless monuments and hand carved temples. Explore The Oberoi Zahra, Luxury Nile Cruiser. See the wonders of ancient Egypt unfold before your eyes as you cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Located on Seminyak Beach and set within 60,702 square metres (15 acres) of lush gardens, the resort features a natural amphitheatre for traditional Balinese dances - offering an inimitable and immersive experience of Bali. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Lombok. Set on the serene shores of Medana Bay and surrounded by surrounded by 97,124 square metres (24 acres) of landscaped gardens, the retreat offers a deep sense of peace and privacy. Infinity pools blend into ocean views, where time slows to the gentle rhythm of island life. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Mauritius. Situated on the white sandy shores of Turtle Bay, a natural marine park, this tropical resort is spread over 80,937 square metres (20 acres) of lush, sub tropical garden and enjoys picture perfect sunset views. Explore The Oberoi, Marrakech. Nestled within citrus orchards and centuries-old olive groves, the hotel features beautifully landscaped gardens and authentic Andalusian architecture, inspired by traditional Moroccan palaces. A serene hotel that reflects the timeless charm of Marrakech. Explore The Oberoi Sukoonvilas, Wadi Safar. Set within historic Diriyah in Saudi Arabia and inspired by the Najdi heritage of Wadi Safar, the exclusive private villas offer expansive valley views, blending quiet luxury, privacy and immersive experiences rooted in nature and culture. Explore Dining View All Madam Chow at The Oberoi, Gurgaon. Celebrates the rich culinary heritage of China, showcasing the finest traditions of Guangdong (Cantonese) and Sichuan - regions renowned for their distinctive flavours, premium ingredients and masterful techniques. Explore Dhilli at The Oberoi, New Delhi. Mentored by Michelin-starred Chef Vineet Bhatia MBE, Dhilli celebrates Delhi’s culinary diversity. Inspired by Chandni Chowk, Rajouri Garden, Jama Masjid, C.R. Park, Nizamuddin, Paranthe Wali Gali and Purani Dilli, the menu reflects the city’s rich traditions. Explore Eau Bar at The Oberoi, Mumbai. With art-deco themed interiors, an outdoor deck, ocean views, exclusive cocktails and live music. Explore Wabi Sabi at The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Inspired by its namesake Japanese philosophy that honours the ephemeral beauty of nature. The soft murmur of a waterfall outside creates a zen-like soundscape while you enjoy the live sushi and sashimi. Explore Surya Mahal at The Oberoi Rajvilas, Jaipur. Our 'Sun Palace' is bright with natural light during the day. After dark, the al fresco courtyard shimmers beneath the phosphorescent moon and the main hall glitters under the light of the crystal chandelier. Explore Rivayat at The Oberoi, Marrakech. An ode to India's culinary traditions, refined to unprecedented levels with innovations by Michelin-starred Chef Rohit Ghai. Explore Wellness View All Oberoi Experiences. Our exclusive Oberoi spa experiences combine treatments to suit specific needs. Be it tension release, skin rejuvenation or full body exfoliation. Let us take care of your wellness needs. Explore Massage. Choose from a wide range of traditional and modern Eastern and Western massage treatments to soothe the senses, restore vitality and revive the spirit. Can be customised to suit your needs. Explore Sensory Experiences. We combine sensory experiences with massage techniques to relax your body and mind, stimulate energy flow and promote healing. Explore Facial Treatments. Take your pick from our specially curated facial treatments to relax, refresh and revitalise your skin, restoring its natural glow. Explore Yoga Stretch and Daily Reflections. Nourish your body and revitalise your soul. Experience postures and breathing techniques to help you attain a state of well-being and serenity. Our expert instructors will be happy to personalise private classes to suit your needs. Explore Experiences View All Forest Bathing at The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. The surrounding Siswan Forest is one of the best places in India to switch off from the world and feel yourself tuning in to nature’s vibrations. Explore Dine Under the Stars at The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. Choose between a specially curated four-course dinner and our recommended Royal Indian ‘thali’. Delicious cuisines and a unique setting to inspire a special occasion. Explore Mountain Biking at Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla. Try one of the best things to do in India. Explore forest trails or off-road mountain trails and connect with nature with a Himalayan mountain biking experience. Explore Scuba Diving at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh. Explore the Red Sea with a variety of water sports and PADI-certified diving experiences. A full range of PADI courses is also available for divers of all levels. Explore The Impressionist High Tea at The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Enjoy a unique experience that commences with a guided horticultural walk around our verdant gardens and ends with a four-course high tea at our alfresco bar, The Polo Club. Explore Offers View All EXCLUSIVE OFFER FOR MEMBERS Enjoy more with every stay Exceptional Savings, Exclusively for Oberoi One Members. Explore book EXTENDED STAY OFFER A Night with our Compliments Let us treat you to a third night’s stay. Explore book SUITE EXPERIENCES Summer stays in cool, urban oases A summer of space, stillness and the city across our urban hotels in Bengaluru, Gurgaon, Mumbai and New Delhi. Explore book UNFORGETTABLE HOLIDAYS Unforgettable summers with Oberoi Stay in our luxury resorts across Agra, Bandhavgarh, Jaipur, Khajuraho, New Chandigarh, Ranthambhore and Udaipur. Explore book Events View All Roshnara and Jahanara Ballrooms at The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. With high ceilings and crystal chandeliers, this is a venue for grand events with up to 190 guests. The space can be divided into two separate halls and includes an attached pre-function area for food and beverage. Explore The Bamboo Grove at The Oberoi, Bengaluru. An open-air venue with garden views. Ideal for sunny brunch gatherings, impactful corporate cocktails and exclusive dinner parties for up to 50 guests. Explore The Grand Ballroom at The Oberoi, Gurgaon. Can host up to 600 guests in its entirety or be divided into three smaller venues. With separate guest and service entrances, a pre-function area for food and beverage with views of a water body. Explore Durbar Hall at The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. Accommodating up to 350 guests or divided into two independent venues. With a large, adjoining, al fresco function area. Explore Grand Canal at The Oberoi, Marrakech. A 120-metre long water body that lies at the heart of our 5 star hotel in Morocco. Events held here enjoy breathtaking views of the Atlas Mountains and our gardens. The ideal venue for evening cocktails for up to 400 guests. Explore Oberoi One Our Distinctive Guest Recognition Programme Oberoi One is our distinctive guest recognition programme that guarantees a host of personalised benefits and privileges from your very first stay. From member-only rates on our website and savings when you dine with us, to flexible check-in and check-out timings and complimentary stays and upgrades. The more often you stay with us, the better the programme gets for you. Our goal is to make each visit to an Oberoi hotel feel personal and meaningful and Oberoi One is our way of getting to serve you better. title: Best 5-Star Luxury Resort Near Ranthambore National Park
meta_description: Experience luxury at The Oberoi Vanyavilas, a 5-star resort near Ranthambore National Park. Enjoy elegant stays, fine dining, and warm hospitality. Book now!
content_body: Best 5-Star Luxury Resort Near Ranthambore National Park Home Login/Join Now Partner Login Welcome to Oberoi One. Our distinctive guest recognition programme. Middle East & Africa Emirates Palace Mandarin Oriental, Abu Dhabi Mandarin Oriental, Doha Asia-Pacific The Landmark Mandarin Oriental, Hong Kong Mandarin Oriental, Hong Kong Mandarin Oriental, Singapore Mandarin Oriental, Bangkok Mandarin Oriental Wangfujing, Beijing Mandarin Oriental, Guangzhou Mandarin Oriental, Jakarta Mandarin Oriental, Kuala Lumpur Mandarin Oriental, Macau Mandarin Oriental, Sanya Mandarin Oriental Pudong, Shanghai Mandarin Oriental, Taipei Mandarin Oriental, Tokyo Europe Mandarin Oriental, Barcelona Mandarin Oriental, Bodrum Mandarin Oriental, Doha Mandarin Oriental, Geneva Mandarin Oriental, Lago di Como Mandarin Oriental Hyde Park, London Mandarin Oriental Ritz, Madrid Mandarin Oriental, Milan Mandarin Oriental, Munich Mandarin Oriental, Paris Mandarin Oriental, Prague Mandarin Oriental Bosphorus, Istanbul Mandarin Oriental, Costa Navarino Mandarin Oriental Mayfair, London Mandarin Oriental Palace, Luzern Al Faisaliah Hotel, Riyadh Vienna (Opening Autumn 2025) Our Alliance Partner - Mandarin Oriental Dining Wellness Experiences Offers Concours d'Elegance Events Destinations Oberoi One By Oberoi Oberoi Select Asmi Giftwrapped Elements CouCou Amadeo Aviation Concours d'Elegance Mandarin Oriental Alliance About Us Our Story From The Heart The Oberoi Group Magazine Awards Gallery Upcoming Hotels Welcome to Ranthambhore Welcome to Ranthambhore Nestled on the edge of the world famous Ranthambhore National Park, home to the majestic Royal Bengal tiger, once the private hunting grounds of the Maharajas of Jaipur, this UNESCO recognized reserve is now one of India’s most celebrated wildlife destinations, renowned for its rich biodiversity, ancient fort, and captivating landscapes of dry deciduous forests, grasslands, and serene lakes. The Oberoi Vanyavilas offers a luxurious gateway to this untamed wilderness, blending the romance of the jungle with the elegance of world class hospitality. Spread across 20 acres of landscaped gardens, waterbodies, and native flora, the resort features 28 lavish tented accommodations inspired by royal caravans. The resort is equipped with electric vehicle (EV) charging stations. Local Time : 1:55 pm Current Weather : 22˚C Location Contact Us Get Directions Share Click to copy The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore Sawai Madhopur, Ranthambhore 322001, India 5-Star Hotel, Ranthambhore Government of India, Ministry of Tourism Travel Notes Sawai Madhopur Railway Station Jaipur Airport Distance : 9 kilometres Driving time : 10 minutes Distance : 148 kilometres Driving time : 3 hours 10 minutes Ranthambhore National Park spans 392 square kilometres (96,914 acres) in the western Indian state of Rajasthan. Situated just minutes by car from Ranthambhore National Park and Tiger Reserve, The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort is perfectly located for you to sight Royal Bengal Tigers in their natural forest environment. The top of the resort’s observation tower commands unrivalled views of the surrounding jungle. Resort Policies Travel Information Accommodation Tents Tents View all Luxury Tents . Inspired by the ancient royal caravans that traversed India, our luxury tents are furnished with a canopied king size bed, teak wood floors, and a claw-footed standalone bathtub. Relax in privacy on sun loungers in your private garden. Explore Book Luxury Tents with Private Pool . Nestled in our serene gardens, this exquisite accommodation with 129 square metre interiors, is a unique retreat that combines the elegance. Explore Book Royal Tent with Private Pool . This distinguished private retreat features two expansive tents, a temperature-controlled swimming pool and a central courtyard with a bonfire and comfortable lounge seating. Explore Book Dining Restaurants Restaurants Bar View all The Dining Room . Take a seat under high-ceilings and sparkling chandeliers in the main hall, or by the bonfire in the courtyard, where you can also enjoy live folk music. Cuisine: International and Rajasthani. Explore The Bar . Enjoy premium beverages and relax by the fireside surrounded by Ranthambhore’s tigresses; humanely captured in oil paintings on the walls. Explore Alfresco Bar . An intimate open-air venue framed by lush trees, with a glowing bonfire at its heart providing a romantic ambience. Traditional Rajasthani folk musicians, add an authentic touch. The Alfresco Bar serves curated Oberoi signature cocktails inspired by night sky constellations and local birds. Explore Wellness Asmi by Oberoi Asmi by Oberoi Swimming Pool Fitness Centre View all Asmi by Oberoi . Asmi is a sanctuary of self-discovery and renewal. Rooted in the Sanskrit philosophy of “I Am,” Asmi embodies balance, awareness and connection with the present moment. Explore Swimming Pool . Immerse yourself in our temperature-controlled pool. Lie back under the shade of a parasol. Enjoy light poolside snacks, beverages and our intuitive hospitality. Explore Fitness Centre . Located in a large air-conditioned tent, our fitness centre has a range of cardiovascular machines and weights. Explore Experiences View all Dine by the Lake A specially handcrafted royal Rajasthani thali is even more special when enjoyed with someone special, at a candlelit table on the stage of our natural amphitheatre. With mashaal fire torches and twinkling stars reflected in our lily pond, our amphitheatre is the perfect setting for romance. Explore Jungle Drive The population of Bengal tigers in Ranthambhore Tiger Reserve is currently estimated to be around eighty. The number of sightings has doubled in recent years, and most of our guests return to us with reports of seeing tigers. Jungle drives are led by experienced, professional guides in Oberoi 4x4s. Explore Children's Activities While you enjoy your holiday at our resort in Ranthambhore, we ensure that your children have a fun time as well. Our children's activities include cooking with an Oberoi chef, pottery, camping, treasure hunting, traditional block printing on fabric, drawing, tree planting and yoga. Explore Nature Walk An exploration of natural surroundings within our property to engage with and appreciate the inherent beauty and ecological intricacies of the environment around. This guided walk with our in-house naturalist will amaze you as you learn more about animals, birds, butterflies, spiders and much more. Explore Private Yoga Sessions Our private yoga sessions can be tailored to suit any age and level of experience. According to individual needs, our instructors teach breathing and meditation techniques, yoga postures and Sanskrit mantras to rejuvenate the body and mind. Explore Offers View all EXTENDED STAY OFFER A Night with our Compliments. Enjoy extraordinary savings when you book for three or more consecutive nights. Explore book EXCLUSIVE OFFER FOR MEMBERS. Enjoy Savings and More. Enjoy 10% savings and INR 5,000 hotel credit. Explore book UNFORGETTABLE HOLIDAYS Unforgettable Experiences With Oberoi . Experience Comfort and Elegance at Our Luxury Resort in Ranthambhore. Explore book EXOTIC VACATIONS A window into the myriad of Indian arts, cultures, cuisines, and extraordinary landscapes . From the exciting national capital to the historical charm of Kolkata; from Himalayan Shimla to the tigers of Ranthambhore and the palaces of Rajasthan. And at every stop, a sincerely warm welcome at Oberoi Hotels & Resorts. Explore book Events View all Meeting Room. For up to 45 guests. With a 65-in LED smart television, a Mac and complimentary high-speed Internet. Other technologies available with prior notice. Explore Attractions View all Ranthambore National Park Ranthambore National Park and Tiger Reserve has been under the protection of the Government of India’s Project Tiger national conservation programme since 1974, after which time dedicated conservation efforts have seen the number of tigers in the area continue to increase. The entire national park spans 1,334 square kilometres and is not only home to tigers, but also the Indian leopard, water buffalo, deer, hogs, hyena, wild cats, sloths and much more. It is located just minutes from The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, rated #1 of Ranthambore’s best resorts. Explore Ranthambhore Fort Start your day with an Oberoi 4x4 Gypsy ride at dawn. Take a private tour around Ranthambhore Park and its 10th century fort, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The fort commands princely views from its perch 700 metres above the surrounding jungle. It is also home to one of India’s oldest temples of Lord Ganesha. Explore National Chambal Gharial Sanctuary The Chambal River is home to India’s largest population of the critically endangered gharial. Characterised by its long thin jaws, the gharial is one of the largest living crocodilians, with males growing up to six metres long. Spot this interesting creature from a boat on the meandering river. Explore Surwal Lake Surwal Lake is approximately half an hour’s drive from Ranthambore’s best resorts, such as The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort. There is a pleasant walkway between the lake and farms that is best experienced at sunrise, when the birds are waking up. You can expect to see kingfishers, robins, geese, pelicans, egrets, hoopoe and many more. Should you wish to visit Surwal Lake during your time with us, please contact the concierge, who would be happy to arrange private transport and a birdwatching guide for you. Explore Dhonk Handicraft Shop One of the best places to visit in Ranthambore, this branch of Tiger Watch NGO provides craft training and employment opportunities for ex-poachers’ families, Moghiya tribal communities and villagers living around Ranthambhore National Park and Tiger Reserve. Dhonk craft products include clothing and accessories for men, women and children. Dhonk is easy to reach from The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, the best of 5 star hotels in Ranthambore National Park area. Explore Awards View all Featured in the Triple Crown Awards 2026 Condé Nast Traveler’s Triple Crown Best Resorts in the World, India (Ranked 3rd) 2025 Condé Nast Traveller, UK, Readers’ Choice Awards One Michelin Key 2025 Michelin Guide Top 20 Resorts in Asia 2025 Condé Nast Traveler, USA, Readers’ Choice Awards Gallery View all The Oberoi Vanyavilas aerial view Amphitheatre View Amphitheatre View Breakfast at Dining Courtyard Breakfast at Dining Courtyard Cooking with Masters Other Destinations India India Egypt Indonesia Mauritius Morocco Saudi Arabia The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. Inspired by Mughal palace designs with fountains, terraced lawns, reflection pools and pavilions, the resort offers unrestricted views of the Taj Mahal. Explore The Oberoi Vindhyavilas Wildlife Resort, Bandhavgarh. An oasis of luxury in the heart of India, nestled in Madhya Pradesh and surrounded by the serene beauty of the wilderness. Explore The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Nestled in lush, tropical grounds and equipped with the latest technology, this urban retreat reflects and harmonises the dual personality of Bengaluru, the Garden City and India’s IT hub. Explore The Oberoi, Gurgaon. A striking example of contemporary design and minutes from New Delhi international and domestic airport terminals, this urban sanctuary offers a sense of calm and seamless connectivity. Explore The Oberoi Rajvilas, Jaipur. A royal resort amidst the timeless charm of the Pink City, recreating the magnificence of princely Rajasthan in a beautiful fort setting with lush gardens and reflection pools. Explore Naila Fort, An Oberoi Luxury Residence, Jaipur (Now Open). An intimate royal retreat rooted in Rajasthan’s heritage. Set high in the Aravalli Ranges, the fort offers sweeping views across forested hills and the plains of Jaipur. A four-bedroom luxury residence, offered exclusively for private stays. Explore The Oberoi Rajgarh Palace, Khajuraho. Perched atop the Maniyargh Hills near Khajuraho in Madhya Pradesh, this 350-year-old palace was built by Raja Hindupat Singh Bundela of the Bundela Dynasty. Its grand vaulted interiors are adorned with intricate frescoes and hand-painted motifs that reflect the artistry and regal heritage of Bundelkhand. Explore The Oberoi Grand, Kolkata (under restoration). An icon on the landscape of Kolkata, with a reputation for taking care of its guests, the heritage landmark stands proudly in the heart of the 'City of Joy'. Explore The Oberoi, Mumbai. A seaside sanctuary in the 'City of Dreams'. Located on Marine Drive in fashionable South Mumbai, the hotel enjoys a superlative position close to key business hubs, cultural landmarks and upscale shopping destinations. Explore The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. A tranquil sanctuary in the Himalayan foothills. Surrounded by protected natural forest, the serene retreat offers personalised Ayurvedic and wellness programmes designed for rejuvenation, balance and inner calm. Explore The Oberoi, New Delhi. An iconic luxury hotel overlooking Delhi Golf Course and Humayun’s Tomb. With world-class dining, round-the-clock service and clean air technology, it reflects Oberoi’s legacy of refined luxury and warm hospitality. Explore The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore. Situated next to Ranthambhore National Park and Tiger Reserve, the resort is perfectly located for sighting Royal Bengal Tigers in their natural habitat. Explore The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla. A Heritage Grand Hotel with rich wooden floors, glowing fireplaces, a grand atrium lobby and panoramic mountain views - echoing the elegance and charm of a bygone era. Explore Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla. Set within 93,077 square metres (23 acres) of fragrant cedar forest and perched 2,515 metres above sea level, the resort offers a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in nature. Wildflower Hall provides a unique opportunity for you to lose yourself in the romance of nature. Explore The Oberoi Udaivilas, Udaipur. Set on the serene banks of Lake Pichola, this palace-inspired retreat captures the romance and grandeur of Udaipur, the ‘City of Lakes.’ With domed pavilions, lush gardens and intricate architecture, every detail reflects the rich heritage of Rajasthan. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh. Discover underwater treasures and beachside luxury that is unmistakably Oberoi, at our all suite resort nestled along the shores of the Red Sea. Explore The Oberoi Philae, Luxury Nile Cruiser. Cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser and fall in love with the secrets of ancient Egypt; from awe inspiring pyramids to timeless monuments and hand carved temples. Explore The Oberoi Zahra, Luxury Nile Cruiser. See the wonders of ancient Egypt unfold before your eyes as you cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Located on Seminyak Beach and set within 60,702 square metres (15 acres) of lush gardens, the resort features a natural amphitheatre for traditional Balinese dances - offering an inimitable and immersive experience of Bali. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Lombok. Set on the serene shores of Medana Bay and surrounded by surrounded by 97,124 square metres (24 acres) of landscaped gardens, the retreat offers a deep sense of peace and privacy. Infinity pools blend into ocean views, where time slows to the gentle rhythm of island life. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Mauritius. Situated on the white sandy shores of Turtle Bay, a natural marine park, this tropical resort is spread over 80,937 square metres (20 acres) of lush, sub tropical garden and enjoys picture perfect sunset views. Explore The Oberoi, Marrakech. Nestled within citrus orchards and centuries-old olive groves, the hotel features beautifully landscaped gardens and authentic Andalusian architecture, inspired by traditional Moroccan palaces. A serene hotel that reflects the timeless charm of Marrakech. Explore The Oberoi Sukoonvilas, Wadi Safar. Set within historic Diriyah in Saudi Arabia and inspired by the Najdi heritage of Wadi Safar, the exclusive private villas offer expansive valley views, blending quiet luxury, privacy and immersive experiences rooted in nature and culture. Explore Frequently Asked Questions Q. What are the check-in and check-out timings at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort? A. Check-in at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore begins at 2:00 pm, and check-out is at 12:00 noon. Guests arriving early or departing later may request flexibility depending on availability. Q. Does The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort offer early check-in and late check-out? A. Yes. Early check-in and late check-out are available upon request, subject to availability. Q. How far is The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort from the nearest railway station and airport? A. Sawai Madhopur Railway Station : Approximately 9 kilometres, around 10 minutes by road. Jaipur Airport : Approximately 148 kilometres, around 3 hours 10 minutes by road. The resort is also conveniently connected to New Delhi by rail via Sawai Madhopur. Q. Does The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort offer airport and station transfers? A. Yes. Transfers to and from Sawai Madhopur Railway Station and Jaipur Airport can be arranged upon request. Please inform the resort of your travel details in advance. Q. Are pets allowed at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort? A. Pets are not permitted at the resort. Read More Q. Are pets allowed at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort? A. Pets are not permitted at the resort. Q. Does The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort offer butler service? A. Yes. Personalised butler service is available across all tented accommodations, ensuring a seamlessly attentive and bespoke stay experience. Q. Does The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort have EV charging facilities? A. Yes. The resort is equipped with electric vehicle (EV) charging stations for guests travelling by electric vehicle. Q. What types of accommodation are available at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort? A. Luxury Tents — Inspired by ancient royal caravans, featuring a canopied king-size bed, teak wood floors, claw-footed standalone bathtub and a private garden with sun loungers. Luxury Tents with Private Pool — Exquisite 129-square-metre retreats combining the romance of tented living with the indulgence of a private pool. Royal Tent with Private Pool — A distinguished private retreat featuring two expansive tents, a temperature-controlled pool, a central courtyard, bonfire and lounge seating. Q. Do the tents at The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort  have private pools? A. Selected accommodations, — the Luxury Tents with Private Pool and the Royal Tent — feature temperature-controlled private pools. Please refer to our accommodation page for full details. title: Forest Bathing | The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh

Step inside the Siswan Forest, breathe deeply, allow yourself to switch off from the world and your whole system will tune in to nature’s vibrations. The medicine of being in the forest is said to boost the immune system, reduce blood pressure and stress, lift the mood, increase energy levels, improve sleep and much more. Duration: 60 minutes. Price: INR 5,000 per session, for up to two guests. *Price excludes taxes. From starlit dining in verdant garden settings to outdoor activities to help you refresh and relax. Enhance your stay with Oberoi experiences and take home memories that will last forever. Featured Experiences Vintage Sidecar Adventure at The Oberoi Marrakech. Recreate the spirit of expeditions from the early 1900s with our exclusive vintage sidecar experience. Explore Colonial Heritage Walk at The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla. Take a guided walk through Shimla’s history and let us share little known facts and colourful stories of the former summer capital of India. Explore Dine Under The Stars at The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. Choose between a specially curated four-course dinner and our recommended Royal Indian 'Thali'. Delicious cuisines and a unique setting to inspire a special occasion. Explore Mountain Biking to Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla. Try one of the best things to do in India. Explore forest trails or off-road mountain trails and connect with nature with a Himalayan mountain biking experience. Explore Scuba Diving Scuba Diving at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh. Explore the Red Sea with a variety of water sports and PADI-certified diving experiences. A full range of PADI courses is also available for divers of all levels. Explore Forest Bathing at  The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. The surrounding Siswan Forest is one of the best places in India to switch off from the world and feel yourself tuning in to nature’s vibrations. Explore The Impressionist High Tea at The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Enjoy a unique experience that commences with a guided horticultural walk around our verdant gardens and ends with a four-course high tea at our alfresco bar, The Polo Club. Explore Unique Experiences India Agra Bandhavgarh Bengaluru Gurgaon Jaipur Khajuraho Mumbai New Chandigarh New Delhi Ranthambhore Shimla - Cecil Shimla - Wildflower Hall Udaipur Egypt Sahl Hasheesh Indonesia Bali Lombok Mauritius Mauritius Morocco Marrakech The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra Our specially curated experiences in Agra capture the essence of this romantic destination with an Oberoi signature. From private, candlelit dining with the one you love to an intimate vow renewal ceremony. We are always happy to customise our offerings to suit your special occasion. Let us help make your time in Agra an unforgettable experience. Explore The Oberoi Vindhyavilas Wildlife Resort, Bandhavgarh Sight Royal Bengal tigers on a private safari through Bandhavgarh National Park. Discover birds, plants and forage for ingredients in our grounds. Celebrate a special occasion with private dining beside lake views. Let us entertain your little ones with treasure hunts, animal tracking and planting activities. Explore The Oberoi, Bengaluru Our exclusive collection of things we curate keeping the city’s temperate climate and our magnificent garden setting on MG Road. From romantic fine dining under the stars to sunlit garden tea parties and cooking with our chefs. For an unforgettable break in the garden city topped off with our personalised attention to your needs. Explore The Oberoi, Gurgaon Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Gurgaon makes the most of our unrivalled location in Delhi’s National Capital Region. From personalised tours of Old Delhi to al fresco dining on the edge of our reflection pool, chocolate making with our experts and private yoga in our resort-like grounds. Explore The Oberoi Rajvilas, Jaipur Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Jaipur captures the essence of this exciting city. Exclusive visits from traditional artisans who are happy to customise authentic souvenirs. Candlelit poolside dining on Rajasthani thalis, relaxing yoga and meditation. We even have a collection of activities for your little ones to enjoy. Explore The Oberoi Rajgarh Palace, Khajuraho Abutting The  Oberoi Rajgarh Palace, Panna National Park (543 square kilometres) is one of India’s most thriving tiger reserves, and a showcase of the success of Project Tiger.  From being bereft of tigers to now being home to over 90 tigers sightings are often just a glance away. Explore The Oberoi,  Mumbai Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Mumbai makes the most of our unrivalled location on Nariman Point. From personalised tours around art galleries and markets, to private poolside dining with ocean views and cooking experiences for you and your little ones. Enhance your stay with Oberoi experiences. Explore The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh Discover a sense of place with our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Chandigarh. Helicopter flights to Amritsar, chauffeur driven tours to Virasat-E-Khalsa; and golfing at Chandigarh Golf Course. Off roading or mountain biking in the Siswan forest around our resort. Personalised spa therapies, champagne under the stars and much more. Explore The Oberoi, New Delhi Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Delhi makes the most of our unrivalled location, just minutes from Khan Market and India Gate. From personalised tours around iconic buildings, fashion stores and religious sites to cooking with an Oberoi chef. Enhance your stay with Oberoi experiences. Explore The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore At The Oberoi Vanyavilas, every experience is crafted to immerse guests in the magic of Ranthambhore. Set out on thrilling jungle safaris in search of the Royal Bengal tiger, enjoy guided nature walks to discover the region’s rich birdlife and flora, or take in panoramic views of the national park from our observation tower. Savor private dining under the stars, participate in interactive cooking sessions with our chefs, or unwind with personalized wellness therapies at the Oberoi Spa. From cultural performances to bespoke celebrations in stunning natural settings, each moment here is designed to be as unforgettable as the landscape itself. Explore The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla The specially curated bouquet of Oberoi experiences available at our hotel in Shimla captures the essence of this timeless hilltop destination. From customised heritage walks around the town to trekking in the woods and al fresco dining. We even have a range of activities to keep your little ones entertained. For an unforgettable holiday for everyone. Explore Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Shimla captures the essence of this unique Himalayan destination. From private dining in our hilltop gazebo, to gourmet picnics in the woods, mountain biking, trekking and yoga. For an unforgettable holiday complemented by our personalised consideration for your needs. Explore The Oberoi Udaivilas, Udaipur Our specially curated bouquet of things to do in Udaipur captures the essence of this fascinating destination. Private dining with views across Lake Pichola, to City Palace. Astrology, traditional art and henna hand painting. Daily yoga and meditation in our vast, lush gardens. We even have a collection of activities for your little ones to enjoy. Each experience has been thoughtfully curated to showcase the spirit of Udaipur. Discover more during your stay at our luxury resort in Udaipur . Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh Enhance your stay with our specially curated experiences that include some of the best things to do in Egypt. Take a cruise on our private boat. Try scuba diving at our PADI certified centre. Renew your vows at our exclusive beachside venue. Get adventurous on a quad bike in the desert. Discover the wonders of ancient Egypt on a day trip to Luxor. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali Presenting a specially curated bouquet of the best things to do in Bali. From personalised tours of legendary temples to vow renewal ceremonies and private candlelit dining on the beach. Mountain biking and surfing, trekking, white-water rafting and turtle hatching at our onsite sanctuary. Only at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Lombok We have curated an exclusive bouquet of the best things to do in Lombok when you stay with us. From scuba diving and snorkelling to candlelit dining on the beach and sunset cruises. Enhance your stay with Oberoi experiences and let the romance blossom. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Mauritius From water sports and scuba diving to candlelit dining or champagne on the beach with sunset views. We even have a range of indoor, online, and outdoor games and activities for your little ones, so that everyone has an unforgettable holiday at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Mauritius. Explore The Oberoi, Marrakech Take a guided tour of Marrakech in a vintage sidecar. Discover the secrets of Moroccan cuisine from our master chefs. Enjoy bird’s-eye views of the Sahara from a helicopter. De-stress with some yoga or work up a sweat with a high-intensity fitness session. Experience the best things to do in Marrakech when you stay with us. Explore ENHANCE YOUR EXPERIENCE WITH US. EVEN MORE. OUR DISTINCTIVE GUEST RECOGNITION PROGRAMME Join Now How may I help you? An island where natural beauty and rich culture exist in perfect harmony. Set on Seminyak Beach within 60,702 square metres (16 acres) of tropical gardens, The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali features traditional pavilion-style accommodation, ocean-facing dining and an open-air amphitheatre for cultural performances. All complemented by specially crafted romantic experiences and our genuine attention to your every need. Local Time : 1:55 pm Current Weather : 22˚C Location Contact Us Get Directions Share Click to copy The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali Jalan Kayu Aya, Denpasar, Bali 80361, Indonesia Travel Notes Bali Airport The Oberoi Lombok Distance : 9 kilometres Driving time : 45 minutes Distance : 177 kilometres Driving time : 6 hours The romantic island of Bali, located in the vast Indonesian archipelago, was an important trading post for the Dutch East India Company. It later became and remains until now, a hub for unique indigenous art, dance and theatre. The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali is located on the fashionable Seminyak Beach and has direct access to 500 metres of pristine sands. Resort Policies Travel Information Accommodation Villas Villas Rooms View all Royal Ocean View Villa with Pool . Relax in the master bedroom or soak in your sunken marble bath. Unwind in the independent living room. Dine al fresco at your private pavilion or dip in your large private pool framed by exotic frangipani trees. Explore Book Luxury Ocean View Villa with Pool . Interiors include a canopied king size bed and an ensuite bathroom with private garden views. Outside, a large terrace, a private pool and an al fresco dining pavilion invite you to relax and unwind in paradise. Explore Book Luxury Partial Ocean View Villa with Pool . These spacious villas with partial ocean views have thatched roofs, naturally lit interiors and a verdant courtyard with a large private pool. A raised dining pavilion offers wider vistas of the nearby sandy beach and azure sea. Explore Book Luxury Garden View Villa with Pool . Unwind in our spacious villas with a thatched roof king-size bedroom, private pool and marble bathroom overlooking the garden. Dine in the al fresco pavilion or lounge in the sun-kissed courtyard for the perfect retreat. Explore Book Luxury Ocean View Villa . Thatched roof king size bedroom with terrace facing the ocean. Private marble bathroom overlooking the garden. Dine in your al fresco pavilion or lounge in your sun kissed courtyard. Enjoy an unforgettable experience of Bali. Explore Book Luxury Garden View Villa . These expansive, thatched roof villas are crafted out of natural materials. Interiors include a king sized four poster bed and a sunken marble bathtub. Exteriors feature an al fresco dining pavilion within a private courtyard. Explore Book Ocean View Lanai . Include a spacious bedroom, an ensuite with private garden and a thoughtfully furnished living area. Step out of your large glass panelled doors and onto your private sunlit terrace for magnificent ocean views. Explore Book Partial Ocean View Lanai . These spacious rooms have traditional thatched roofs and king size or twin beds. The ensuite bathroom presents views of a private walled garden. Exteriors include a terrace for al fresco private dining. Explore Book Garden View Lanai . With traditional thatched roof and air conditioning, these spacious rooms are furnished with a king size or twin beds. Large glass panelled doors open onto a private terrace, for al fresco dining with garden views. Explore Book Dining Restaurants Restaurants Bars View all Frangipani Cafe . Al fresco dining just steps from Seminyak Beach. Intimate teak wood seating is shaded by Balinese parasols and coconut trees, frangipani and hibiscus. Cuisine: European, Indian and Indonesian dishes. Explore Kura Kura Restaurant . Named for the sea turtles that nest on the nearby sands, our thatched, open air restaurant offers magnificent ocean views and warm, fragrant sea breezes. Cuisine: European, Indian and Indonesian dishes. Explore The Amphitheatre . Themed dinners accompanied by traditional Balinese dance performances regularly, at our natural stone amphitheatre designed in the style of a palace. Cuisine: Themed dinners. Explore Kayu Bar . Take a seat at a candlelit table alongside ocean and tropical gardens views. Enjoy curated cocktails, Champagne, fine wines and casual dining. Explore Wellness The Oberoi Spa The Oberoi Spa Swimming Pool Fitness Centre Experience View all The Oberoi Spa . Experience Balinese, Western and Oberoi signature treatments that harmonise ancient rituals and modern science. Thatched therapy rooms overlooking tropical gardens and lily ponds. Coupled with natural ingredients to cleanse, tone and refresh the body and mind. Explore Swimming Pool . Located on the beachfront with uninterrupted views of Seminyak beach and the ocean. Take a dip, relax on the sun loungers or savour a healthy snack at the poolside. Explore Fitness Centre . Air conditioned and equipped with a range of cardiovascular and weights machines, as well as free weights. With views across our tropical gardens. Explore Turtle Sanctuary . Between May and October, Olive Ridley turtles lay their eggs on the beach in front of our resort. We safeguard these at a saltwater sanctuary within our grounds. After incubating for 45 to 50 days, the baby turtles begin to hatch. We invite you to visit our sanctuary and help us release the hatchlings into the sea. Explore Experiences View all Exotic Candlelit Dinner Savour an exquisite, starlit dinner on the shores of Seminyak beach, with breathtaking views of the Indian Ocean and Bali's dramatic coastline. Enjoy a bespoke menu, crafted in collaboration with our master chefs, accompanied by soft, traditional Balinese instruments and the sound of crashing waves. Explore Full Moon Celebration Let us help you dress in a traditional, Balinese sarong in preparation to honour the full moon goddess Candra  with flowers and blessings. A private dinner for two on the full-moonlit seashore completes the experience. Explore Mountain Cycling Experience an adrenaline rush on this exciting downhill cycle ride. Cruise along for 2.5 hours through the forests and past rice paddies that dot the 33 kms from Kintamani to Ubud. Minimum age 7 years. Minimum height 135 cm. A professional guide and a one way transfer from our Bali resort are included. Explore Renewal of Vows Be it in our beautiful seaside garden, on the wide sands of Seminyak beach, or at the elegant poolside of a private villa, you can renew your marriage vows in an authentic Balinese Hindu ceremony led by a Pemangku (Balinese Hindu priest), in traditional Balinese dress with traditional décor. Explore Sunset Blessing at Petitenget Temple Founded in the 15th century, the nearby mystical Petitenget Temple is said to give the surrounding locale of Seminyak a particularly tranquil atmosphere. With this experience, you can enjoy a short, guided drive to the temple, a private blessing ceremony with the priest and a tour with a local expert. Explore Offers View all BEST OF INDONESIA. Oberoi Hospitality on Two Islands. A warm welcome to tropical island paradise. Twice. Explore book EXCLUSIVE OFFER FOR MEMBERS Enjoy Savings and More. Exceptional savings, exclusively for Oberoi One members. Explore book UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCE Exotic Destinations Await. Stay with us at Bali for two nights or more and take away memories to last a lifetime. Explore book EXOTIC ESCAPE Timeless luxury and legendary hospitality in exotic Bali. Exclusive Privileges for Two nights and more at Special Rates Explore book EXTENDED STAY RATE Gain More by Stretching your Holiday. The perfect choice to experience a luxurious stay. Explore book EARLY ADVANTAGE RATE The Benefits of Being an Early Bird. Book early and enjoy special savings. Explore book Events View all Garden by the Sea. Surrounded by lush tropical flora and caressed by the balmy breeze, with a backdrop of ocean vistas. The gardens of our Lower Lobby lend themselves perfectly for an intimate wedding ceremony for up to 50 guests. Explore Exotic Villa Wedding. A spacious private villa is the perfect venue for an intimate wedding for up to 10 guests. Villa weddings include an optional customised floating flower display in the private pool. Explore Bale Banjar. Host a seminar, a conference or a meeting for up to 30 people. Or a standing cocktail for up to 50 guests. Explore Attractions View all Seminyak Village Seminyak Village not only stocks international high street brands, but features clothes, jewellery and artworks by top local and national artisans who pride themselves on using natural products, indigenous designs and keeping traditions alive by adding a contemporary twist to Balinese icons. Well worth a visit if you are staying at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Seminyak Village is within easy walking distance of our Bali beach resort. We can also arrange transport for you and your purchase back to your accommodation. Explore Discovery Shopping Mall Discovery Shopping Mall is located in the Bali beach resort of Kuta and boasts direct beach access. It has more than 150 retail local, national, Asian and western retail outlets selling clothes, make up, children’s wear and entertainment, electronics, jewellery, food and beverages. Each to reach on foot or in a private vehicle from The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali, and many other Bali hotels and Bali resorts, Discovery Shopping Mall is one of the best places to visit in Bali for shopping. Explore Baluran National Park Baluran National Park is located on the eastern side of Java, making it an easy trip from neighbouring Bali. The park features Mount Baluran at its highest point. The terrain is largely savanna, lowland and mangrove forests, and gentle hills. Over 400 hundred plant species have been recorded in Baluran National Park, as well as over 150 bird species and almost 30 species of mammal. Many of which are endangered. Please contact the concierge at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali 5 star resort for flight and other information. Explore Mount Ijen Mount Ijen is a volcano in Java that is renowned for its acidic crater lake, sulphur mining and blue flame phenomenon. Due to the intense sulphur mining here, the huge azure crater lake at the top of the mountain is the largest and most acidic lake in the world. Also, due to gases released during the sulphur mining process, at night, huge blue flames can be seen shooting out of the top of the volcano, which has in recent years, spurred a rise in night-time treks to the area. Flights from Denpasar to Surabaya can be arranged through most Bali hotels and Bali resorts, such as The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Explore Besakih Temple Pura Besakih Temple is one of the most popular places to visit in Bali. It casts a dramatic spell, perched high up on the slopes of the sacred Mount Agung. Pura Besakih is esteemed as the most important Hindu temple and has become one of the most well-known Bali tourist places. Pura Besakih is comprised of 23 interrelated temples which are arranged over six terraced levels connected by flights of stairs. All of which lead to the main spire. Make it to the top and you will be met with the beautiful lotus throne. The best time to visit Bali’s Pura Besakih might be on the occasion of one of its seventy plus annual religious festivals. Please contact the concierge at The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali for more information. Explore Awards View all Best Resorts in the World, Indonesia 2025 Condé Nast Traveller, UK, Readers’ Choice Awards Top 10 Resorts in Indonesia (Ranked 1st) 2024 Conde Nast Traveller, UK, Readers’ Choice Awards Top 500 Hotels in the World 2024 Travel + Leisure, USA Among Top 100 Hotels in the World 2023 Travel + Leisure, World’s Best Award Gallery View all Other Destinations India India Egypt Indonesia Mauritius Morocco Saudi Arabia The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra. Inspired by Mughal palace designs with fountains, terraced lawns, reflection pools and pavilions, the resort offers unrestricted views of the Taj Mahal. Explore The Oberoi Vindhyavilas Wildlife Resort, Bandhavgarh. An oasis of luxury in the heart of India, nestled in Madhya Pradesh and surrounded by the serene beauty of the wilderness. Explore The Oberoi, Bengaluru. Nestled in lush, tropical grounds and equipped with the latest technology, this urban retreat reflects and harmonises the dual personality of Bengaluru, the Garden City and India’s IT hub. Explore The Oberoi, Gurgaon. A striking example of contemporary design and minutes from New Delhi international and domestic airport terminals, this urban sanctuary offers a sense of calm and seamless connectivity. Explore The Oberoi Rajvilas, Jaipur. A royal resort amidst the timeless charm of the Pink City, recreating the magnificence of princely Rajasthan in a beautiful fort setting with lush gardens and reflection pools. Explore Naila Fort, An Oberoi Luxury Residence, Jaipur (Now Open). An intimate royal retreat rooted in Rajasthan’s heritage. Set high in the Aravalli Ranges, the fort offers sweeping views across forested hills and the plains of Jaipur. A four-bedroom luxury residence, offered exclusively for private stays. Explore The Oberoi Rajgarh Palace, Khajuraho. Perched atop the Maniyargh Hills near Khajuraho in Madhya Pradesh, this 350-year-old palace was built by Raja Hindupat Singh Bundela of the Bundela Dynasty. Its grand vaulted interiors are adorned with intricate frescoes and hand-painted motifs that reflect the artistry and regal heritage of Bundelkhand. Explore The Oberoi Grand, Kolkata (under restoration). An icon on the landscape of Kolkata, with a reputation for taking care of its guests, the heritage landmark stands proudly in the heart of the 'City of Joy'. Explore The Oberoi, Mumbai. A seaside sanctuary in the 'City of Dreams'. Located on Marine Drive in fashionable South Mumbai, the hotel enjoys a superlative position close to key business hubs, cultural landmarks and upscale shopping destinations. Explore The Oberoi Sukhvilas Resort & Spa, Siswan Forest, New Chandigarh. A tranquil sanctuary in the Himalayan foothills. Surrounded by protected natural forest, the serene retreat offers personalised Ayurvedic and wellness programmes designed for rejuvenation, balance and inner calm. Explore The Oberoi, New Delhi. An iconic luxury hotel overlooking Delhi Golf Course and Humayun’s Tomb. With world-class dining, round-the-clock service and clean air technology, it reflects Oberoi’s legacy of refined luxury and warm hospitality. Explore The Oberoi Vanyavilas Wildlife Resort, Ranthambhore. Situated next to Ranthambhore National Park and Tiger Reserve, the resort is perfectly located for sighting Royal Bengal Tigers in their natural habitat. Explore The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla. A Heritage Grand Hotel with rich wooden floors, glowing fireplaces, a grand atrium lobby and panoramic mountain views - echoing the elegance and charm of a bygone era. Explore Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort, Shimla. Set within 93,077 square metres (23 acres) of fragrant cedar forest and perched 2,515 metres above sea level, the resort offers a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in nature. Wildflower Hall provides a unique opportunity for you to lose yourself in the romance of nature. Explore The Oberoi Udaivilas, Udaipur. Set on the serene banks of Lake Pichola, this palace-inspired retreat captures the romance and grandeur of Udaipur, the ‘City of Lakes.’ With domed pavilions, lush gardens and intricate architecture, every detail reflects the rich heritage of Rajasthan. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Sahl Hasheesh. Discover underwater treasures and beachside luxury that is unmistakably Oberoi, at our all suite resort nestled along the shores of the Red Sea. Explore The Oberoi Philae, Luxury Nile Cruiser. Cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser and fall in love with the secrets of ancient Egypt; from awe inspiring pyramids to timeless monuments and hand carved temples. Explore The Oberoi Zahra, Luxury Nile Cruiser. See the wonders of ancient Egypt unfold before your eyes as you cruise along the River Nile on this award winning cruiser. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Bali. Located on Seminyak Beach and set within 60,702 square metres (15 acres) of lush gardens, the resort features a natural amphitheatre for traditional Balinese dances - offering an inimitable and immersive experience of Bali. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Lombok. Set on the serene shores of Medana Bay and surrounded by surrounded by 97,124 square metres (24 acres) of landscaped gardens, the retreat offers a deep sense of peace and privacy. Infinity pools blend into ocean views, where time slows to the gentle rhythm of island life. Explore The Oberoi Beach Resort, Mauritius. Situated on the white sandy shores of Turtle Bay, a natural marine park, this tropical resort is spread over 80,937 square metres (20 acres) of lush, sub tropical garden and enjoys picture perfect sunset views. Explore The Oberoi, Marrakech. Nestled within citrus orchards and centuries-old olive groves, the hotel features beautifully landscaped gardens and authentic Andalusian architecture, inspired by traditional Moroccan palaces. A serene hotel that reflects the timeless charm of Marrakech. Explore The Oberoi Sukoonvilas, Wadi Safar. Set within historic Diriyah in Saudi Arabia and inspired by the Najdi heritage of Wadi Safar, the exclusive private villas offer expansive valley views, blending quiet luxury, privacy and immersive experiences rooted in nature and culture.
